title: InstantEat
description: Removes Eating Animation. Allows for faster eating. Allows for eating even if full.
body:
**Video Preview:**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3FznG3JDNWY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### This mod just removes eating animation but it has additional features too!
- Instant Eat[core feature]
- Fast Eating[Hold to eat very fast, WIP]
- Auto Refill[Auto Reffil food in your slot]
- Black & White List
- Eating even if full

*Mod Will be ported into older/newer versions in future

I like using this mod with Saturation Plus Mod and in my modpack i'm making.

Suggestions and Bug request -> **[There!](https://discord.gg/MpuFrKAYtK)**
